description_long: This is a pair of modern, chunky platform shoes with a brown upper and thick black soles. The shoes feature two wide, black straps across the instep and ankle, providing both support and a bold visual accent. The upper material appears to be a matte, leather-like finish, while the sole is made of a dense, rubbery material. The shoes have a closed toe and a high, blocky heel, giving them a contemporary, urban look. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the design is minimalistic yet striking. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for walking on city streets.
description: Chunky brown platform shoes with black straps and thick black soles, featuring a modern, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Rear and side view showing the tall, blocky heel and the vertical seam running up the back of the shoe.
description_view_1: Front and side view highlighting the rounded toe, wide black straps, and the substantial platform sole.
description_view_2: Angled front view displaying both shoes, emphasizing the broad toe box and the placement of the straps.
description_view_3: Side and rear view focusing on the heel height, the back seam, and the overall silhouette of the shoes.
